_publications._publicationTitle: The haploinsufficient hematopoietic microenvironment is critical to the pathological fracture repair in murine models of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: There was a 30% reduction in mineralizing surface (MS/BS), a 20% reduction in mineral apposition rate (MAR), and a 50% reduction in bone formation rate
details: Showed 30% reduction in mineralizing surface, 20% reduction in mineral apposition rate, and 50% reduction in bone formation rate
